title: epidendrum purum
intro: Epidendrum purum, also known as the pure orchid tree or queen of the Andes, is a type of orchid native to the Andean region of South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum purum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
